input: On September 28, 2025, daylight saving time (DST) begins in the Chatham Islands. At the DST transition, the local clocks move forward from 02:45 to 03:45. The meeting involves participants in two locations: Chatham Islands New York City Determine the local start and end times in both locations. Assume all listed locations correctly observe DST according to their local time zones. Report your answer in the following format (single line with score): Chatham Islands: HH:MM – HH:MM, New York City: HH:MM – HH:MM : X.X. NO EXPLANATIONS.
